name: Overlay Booster
name_jp: オーバーレイ・ブースター
desc: If you control a monster with 2000 or more ATK, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Defense Position. You can only Special Summon "Overlay Booster" once per turn this way.  If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it, then target 1 face-up Xyz Monster you control that has material; it gains 500 ATK for each material attached to it.
mnst_eff: If you control a monster with 2000 or more ATK, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Defense Position. You can only Special Summon "Overlay Booster" once per turn this way.  If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it, then target 1 face-up Xyz Monster you control that has material; it gains 500 ATK for each material attached to it.
eff: If you control a monster with 2000 or more ATK, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Defense Position. You can only Special Summon "Overlay Booster" once per turn this way.  If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it, then target 1 face-up Xyz Monster you control that has material; it gains 500 ATK for each material attached to it.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
